text.title: Agent Reasoning Depth Budget Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply agent-reasoning-depth-budget. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Pick 4 budgets to sweep (e.g., 1024 / 2048 / 4096 / 8192 tokens).
step.description: Input: task class. Action: Decide sweep.. Output: sweep plan.

step.name: Run eval at each budget; record score and cost.
step.description: Input: sweep plan + eval. Action: Execute sweeps.. Output: budget table.
step.note: Step 2. Required input: sweep plan + eval.

step.name: Apply r2 Pareto pick.
step.description: Input: budget table. Action: Choose budget.. Output: budget decision.

step.name: Add under/over detectors per r3.
step.description: Input: budget decision + traces. Action: Author detectors.. Output: detectors live.
step.note: Step 4. Required input: budget decision + traces.

step.name: Implement inter-turn compression per r4.
step.description: Input: multi-turn agent. Action: Author compressor.. Output: compression live.

step.name: Document budget table; schedule re-eval at next model release.
step.description: Input: all above. Action: Author doc.. Output: budget-table.md.
